description: Negative fixtures: each MUST FAIL validation against its schema. Consumed by console/tests/test_managed_platform_schemas.py::test_invalid_examples_are_rejected. `version` selects the schema directory (defaults to v1alpha1).

cases.reason: entitlement signature must be ed25519, not sigstore-cosign
owner_access must be preserved and export_available true in every state
expired must pause premium agents/tasks and read-only additional users
public lane pins mirrorable true (only mirrorable is flipped: fails the mirrorable const alone)
public lane REQUIRES mirrorable/requires_hub_account/distribution; omitting mirrorable must fail (item 3)
restricted lane pins mirrorable false; a grant-gated pack cannot be freely mirrorable (item 4)
source personal_base MUST declare edition personal (item 1)
source verified_entitlement MUST carry entitlement_ref (item 1 reciprocal)
personal_base pins subscription_state to active when present; a degraded state (suspended) is rejected (N1)
memberships must contain exactly one owner; zero owners is rejected (item 2)
memberships must contain exactly one owner; two owners is rejected (item 2)
OrganizationId is lowercase-canonical so it round-trips inside a PackageScope (item 5)
managed modality presupposes team/organization edition, not personal
